scenario.title: Chat/InfraChat bug cluster: finishedAt type, approval handlers, memory leak, log flicker
steps: Submit a status prompt and verify assistant response
Create an issue to trigger the question flow
Verify question panel renders with File/Cancel options
Cancel the question and verify it resolves
Navigate to a loop detail view to verify log viewer stability

assertions.description: The InfraChatPanel renders and responds to prompts
The question flow renders and resolves correctly
The log viewer renders segment data without flickering (stable callback identity)

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Chat/InfraChat bug cluster: finishedAt type, approval handlers, memory leak, log flicker

![InfraChatPanel responds to a prompt with assistant message](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/b02ecc7c25bd18a116ec77943d05f3cabca19c38/openspec/changes/gh-156-chat-infra-bug-cluster/evidence/01-infra-chat-response.webp)
![QuestionPanel renders with File/Cancel options for issue creation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/b02ecc7c25bd18a116ec77943d05f3cabca19c38/openspec/changes/gh-156-chat-infra-bug-cluster/evidence/02-question-panel.webp)
![InfraChatPanel remains stable with no callback-induced re-renders](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/b02ecc7c25bd18a116ec77943d05f3cabca19c38/openspec/changes/gh-156-chat-infra-bug-cluster/evidence/03-log-viewer-stable.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Open the InfraChatPanel
2. Submit a status prompt and verify assistant response
3. Create an issue to trigger the question flow
4. Verify question panel renders with File/Cancel options
5. Cancel the question and verify it resolves
6. Navigate to a loop detail view to verify log viewer stability

</details>
